samples.xml_description:
<module id="multi_8bit">
    <description>Implement 8-bit multiplication using shift and add.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="A" width_description="[7:0]">8-bit input operand A.</input>
        <input id="B" width_description="[7:0]">8-bit input operand B.</input>
        <output id="product" width_description="[15:0]">16-bit output for the product.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <parameter name="BIT_WIDTH" value="8" type="size_t">Bit width for inputs A and B.</parameter>
        <parameter name="OUTPUT_WIDTH" value="16" type="size_t">Output width for product.</parameter>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" width_description="[OUTPUT_WIDTH-1:0]" id="product">Product accumulator.</reg>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" width_description="[BIT_WIDTH-1:0]" id="shift_cnt">Counter for shift operations.</reg>
        <reg type="combinational_logic" id="add_en">Enable signal for addition.</reg>
        <reg type="combinational_logic" id="shift_en">Enable signal for shifting.</reg>
        <reg type="combinational_logic" id="rst_n">Active-low reset signal.</reg>
        <reg type="combinational_logic" id="done">Done signal.</reg>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        <assignment id="add_en">B[shift_cnt]</assignment>
        <assignment id="shift_en">~done && ~add_en</assignment>
        <assignment id="rst_n">1'b1</assignment>
        <always>
            <case>
                <case_item id="add_en">
                    <if condition="add_en">product <= product + A;</if>
                    <else>product <= product;</if>
                </case_item>
                <case_item id="shift_en">
                    <if condition="shift_en">product <= product << 1;</if>
                    <else>product <= product;</if>
                </case_item>
            </case>
        </always>
        <always>
            <if condition="rst_n">shift_cnt <= 0;</if>
            <else>shift_cnt <= shift_cnt + 1;</else>
        </always>
        <always>
            <if condition="rst_n">done <= 0;</if>
            <else>done <= shift_cnt == 8;</else>
        </always>
    </implementation>
</module>
